title: Wish
description: A non-binding (or culturally/religiously binding) wish — funeral, letter of wishes, care instructions, pet care, digital estate, distribution preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for this wish within the INHERIT document.

wishType.$comment: funeral: wishes about funeral arrangements — burial vs cremation, ceremony type, music, readings. letter: a letter of wishes to executors or family — guidance on how to exercise discretion. care: care instructions for a dependant (elderly parent, disabled family member). distribution: preferences about how specific items should be distributed informally. digital: instructions for digital accounts and online presence. pets: care arrangements for animals. general: any wish not covered by the other categories.
wishType.description: The category of wish. Wishes may be non-binding in law but culturally or religiously obligatory.

title.description: A short descriptive title for this wish.

content.description: The full text content of the wish. May be lengthy for letters of wishes.
examples: I wish to be cremated and my ashes scattered at Coniston Water
Please ensure my cat Mochi is rehomed with my sister Akiko
Burial in accordance with Islamic rites — contact Imam Hassan at the East London Mosque
Please ensure my dog is cared for by my nephew Tendai

bindingNature.$comment: non_binding: carries no legal force — guidance only. culturally_obligatory: expected to be followed under cultural norms (e.g. African burial customs). religiously_obligatory: required under religious law (e.g. Islamic burial within 24 hours, Jewish tahara). legally_binding: enforceable by law in the relevant jurisdiction (rare for wishes — most are advisory).
bindingNature.description: The legal or moral force of this wish. Most wishes are non-binding but may carry significant cultural or religious weight.

addresseePersonId.description: Reference to the Person.id this wish is addressed to — typically an executor, guardian, or family member.

relatedAssetId.description: Reference to an Asset.id this wish relates to (e.g. a pet, a digital account, a specific item).

examples: Written in consultation with Imam Hassan — follows Hanafi funeral practice
Updated after acquiring second dog in 2024
